name: tiny_cuda_test
command: import torch; print('torch', torch.__version__); print('cuda', torch.cuda.is_available()); print('gpu', torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)); torch.cuda.empty_cache(); x=torch.randn((1024,1024),device='cuda',dtype=torch.float16); y=x@x; torch.cuda.synchronize(); print('mean', float(y.float().mean())); print('max_allocated_mib', torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated()/1024/1024)
